title: Master Ask AI Upgrades in GoHighLevel — Work Smarter
description: Master Ask AI Upgrades in GoHighLevel. Learn transparent thought planning, Support Agent setup, and content creation workflows. Work smarter, not harder.
html_content:
If you're running an agency or managing multiple client projects in GoHighLevel, you know how much time gets eaten up by repetitive tasks—content creation, asset building, answering common support questions. That's exactly where Ask AI Upgrades changes the game. Instead of jumping between tools or wrestling with complex prompts, you get a smarter, more transparent virtual assistant built directly into your platform. In this guide, I'll walk you through the redesigned interface, the step-by-step thought planning workflow, and how to leverage the built-in Support Agent to work faster without needing a degree in prompt engineering. Ready to transform how your team operates? Start your free 30-day trial and see the difference AI-powered workflows can make.

📋 In This Guide

  • What Ask AI Upgrades Actually Does
  • The New UI and Transparent Thought Planning
  • Built-In Support Agent Integration
  • How to Set Up Ask AI Upgrades (Agency Level)
  • Real-World Use Cases for Content and Asset Creation
  • The Consumption-Based Pricing Model

What Ask AI Upgrades Actually Does

Ask AI Upgrades is GoHighLevel's answer to the problem of fragmented workflows. Instead of toggling between ChatGPT, your email, Slack, and a dozen other tools, you have a native AI assistant embedded in your CRM that understands your HighLevel workflows. It generates copy in your brand voice, creates landing page content, builds email sequences, drafts social media posts, and even answers your most common support questions—all without leaving the platform.

What makes this different from generic AI tools? It's transparent and context-aware. You can see exactly how the AI arrived at its answer, not just the final output. For agency owners and team members managing multiple client accounts, this transparency is crucial. You're not guessing whether the AI took a weird turn—you can audit the reasoning step-by-step.

The feature is currently available to Agency-level users and admins, which means if you're running a multi-user account or managing sub-accounts for clients, you're in the right tier to unlock this power.

The New UI and Transparent Thought Planning

The redesigned interface for Ask AI Upgrades is built around simplicity without sacrificing power. Gone are the days of needing to engineer perfect prompts to get usable output. The new UI guides you through a three-step workflow:

Step 1: Define Your Task — Tell Ask AI what you need. This could be as simple as "Write a welcome email for my new fitness coaching clients" or "Create three headlines for a landing page about mortgage refinancing." No technical jargon required.

Step 2: Review the Thought Planning — This is the secret sauce. Before Ask AI generates your content, it shows you its "thinking." You'll see exactly what assumptions it's making, what tone it detected, and what parameters it's using. If something's off, you can course-correct before it spends tokens on the full response.

Step 3: Get Your Output — Once you've approved (or tweaked) the thought plan, Ask AI generates the final content. You can copy it directly into your campaigns, save it as a template, or iterate further.

💡 Pro Tip

Use the thought planning stage to batch-check multiple AI outputs. Review five thought plans in a row, approve them all, then let Ask AI generate content while you focus on other tasks. This is a game-changer for agencies managing 10+ client accounts.

Built-In Support Agent Integration

One of the biggest time-sinks for agencies and service providers is repetitive customer support. "How do I reset my password?" "When is my next appointment?" "Do you offer a discount for annual billing?" These questions come in dozens of times per week across all your clients.

Ask AI Upgrades includes a built-in Support Agent that learns your FAQ and common answers. You can feed it your knowledge base, and it automatically answers these routine questions without human intervention. Your team only jumps in when a real issue needs attention.

The Support Agent isn't just a dumb chatbot spitting out templated responses. It understands context—it knows whether a customer is asking about billing, scheduling, product features, or onboarding. It can reference your actual pricing, your real process, and your specific workflows. For agencies building out white-label solutions for clients, this is a significant differentiator.

How to Set Up Ask AI Upgrades (Agency Level)

If you're an Agency-level user or admin, setup is straightforward. Here's the path:

1. Navigate to Settings — Log into your GoHighLevel account and head to the main settings menu. Look for the AI or Integrations section.

2. Locate Ask AI Upgrades — You'll see Ask AI listed as an available add-on. Click to enable it for your agency account.

3. Configure Your Preferences — Set your brand voice, choose which AI models you want to use (HighLevel supports Claude, Gemini, and GPT options), and decide on token consumption limits if needed.

4. Add Your Knowledge Base — For the Support Agent feature, upload your FAQ, help docs, or knowledge base so the AI has context for answering customer questions.

5. Set User Permissions — Decide which team members can access Ask AI and at what level. Admins can create templates; other users can use existing ones.

Once set up, every user on your Agency account can access Ask AI from the main dashboard or contextually within specific modules (email builder, landing page builder, etc.).

Real-World Use Cases for Content and Asset Creation

Here's where Ask AI Upgrades actually saves your agency money and time:

Email Campaigns — Write a brief about your client's offer ("$500 off tax services for new clients"), and Ask AI generates 5 subject line variants, the email body in your client's tone, and a post-send follow-up. You review the thought plan, approve it, and you're done in 10 minutes instead of an hour.

Landing Page Copy — Instead of staring at a blank page, Ask AI generates hero copy, benefit sections, and CTA buttons tailored to your client's industry. You keep what works, edit what doesn't, and launch faster.

Social Media Content Calendar — Feed Ask AI a product or service description and ask for 30 days of social posts across LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook. It generates variations in different tones, and you schedule them in batches.

Client Onboarding Assets — Create welcome sequences, setup checklists, and FAQ documents that reflect your client's brand and process, all generated and ready to customize in minutes.

The Consumption-Based Pricing Model

HighLevel recently updated AI pricing to be consumption-based rather than flat-rate. This matters because it gives you flexibility. You only pay for what you use. If you're generating 100 emails one month and 500 the next, your costs scale accordingly. The platform uses tokens as the unit of measurement, similar to how OpenAI's API works.

You can choose which AI model powers your requests—Claude, Gemini, or GPT—and each has different token costs and strengths. Some users prefer Claude for creative copy; others lean on GPT for technical or analytical content. This flexibility is actually a hidden advantage over single-model competitors.

For Agency-level accounts, you can set team token budgets and track usage per sub-account, making it easy to bill clients back for AI usage if that's part of your service model.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need to know prompt engineering to use Ask AI Upgrades?

No. The entire point of the upgrade is to make AI accessible without technical expertise. The new UI walks you through defining what you want, reviewing the AI's thinking, and getting results. If you can describe your task in a sentence or two, you're good.

Can I use Ask AI Upgrades if I'm not on Agency tier?

Currently, Ask AI Upgrades is available to Agency-level users and admins. If you're on a lower tier, you have access to basic Ask AI, but the upgraded interface and advanced features require Agency tier.

Does Ask AI learn from my brand or past content?

You can upload brand guidelines, past email samples, and style guides so Ask AI understands your voice better. The more context you give it, the more aligned the outputs will be to your brand.

How does the Support Agent know my FAQ answers?

You feed it your knowledge base, FAQ documents, or help center content during setup. It references this when answering customer questions. You can update it anytime as your offerings change.

What happens if Ask AI generates something I don't like?

You're in control. The thought planning stage lets you tweak assumptions before generation. If the final output misses the mark, you can ask for a revision, change the parameters, or edit manually. It's a tool that works for you, not the other way around.

Why Ask AI Upgrades Matters Right Now

The agencies winning in 2024 and beyond aren't the ones with the biggest teams—they're the ones working smarter. Ask AI Upgrades is a force multiplier. Your single copywriter can now produce 3x the output. Your support team can handle 5x the volume. Your account managers can focus on strategy instead of writing the hundredth welcome email.

The transparent thought planning ensures quality control. The Support Agent reduces manual support overhead. The integration with HighLevel's CRM and automation means you're not copying and pasting between platforms. It all lives in one place, with one login, one source of truth.
